mapper.insert: INSERT INTO strain_data ( sensor_id, strain_value, collect_time, create_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{sensorId}, #{strainValue}, #{collectTime}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT sensor_id AS sensorId, strain_value AS strainValue, collect_time AS collectTime FROM strain_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
